name: nivaa-stays-site
description: Build tooling for the Nivaa Stays static site (Tailwind compile).

scripts.build:planner: npm --prefix planner-src install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix planner-src run build
scripts.build:analytics: npm --prefix analytics-src install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix analytics-src run build
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:planner && npm run build:analytics && npm run cache-bust && npm run inline-css
